series_metadata.series_title: Public & Private Licensing & Monitoring, Enforcement Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: Public and private agency licensing records, including items necessary to determine agency compliance with licensing rules and enforcement documentation. Included also will be copies of child welfare agency written policies, approvals, financial audits, tables of organization, position descriptions, corrective actin plans, articles of incorporation, BCI and FBI results, enforcement documentation and related correspondence.
